candidate_evidence.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday midpoint rotation rejection rank over midpoint distance pressure, failed midpoint cross depth, rotation compression ratio, midpoint rejection wick, close escape strength, range balance skew, volume reengagement, prior-day midpoint context, session escape pressure, and spread stress features
candidate_evidence.next_boundary: C0082 R0001 should be retained as useful candidate evidence only. Next C0082 work should design a true R0002 hardening run for cost/slippage survival and portability, not selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims.
candidate_evidence.reason_not_selected: profitability is modest, 3 of 9 folds are losing, tick execution is worse than logic in 7 of 9 folds, stress hardening and native materialization are not complete, ONNX readiness is absent, and historical repo lineage debt blocks selected, promotion, handoff, and reproducibility claims
candidate_evidence.reason_retained: R0001 reached target-band activity, proxy PF 1.097229, MT5 logic parity passed with mismatch_count 0, MT5 tick PF 1.129524, total tick net PnL 36.72, and 6 of 9 fold-isolated tick folds were profitable

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 6 profitable and 3 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL 36.72, and worst fold rw_002 net PnL -3.06.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the candidate evidence is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution was worse than closed-bar logic by -23.74 net PnL across 7 worse and 2 better folds.
Cost/slippage hardening, native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: candidate_evidence_retained_not_selected; C0082 R0001 has positive target-band activity and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence, but 3 losing folds, modest PF, tick-worse divergence, missing stress hardening, missing native signal materialization, missing ONNX, and repo lineage debt block stronger claims

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday midpoint rotation rejection rank
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0082 R0001 tests whether a failed intraday midpoint cross followed by compression and escape-side close can rank target-first escape path quality. It is not an adjacent threshold, SL/TP, hold, session, activity, spread-only, capital, materialization, ONNX, or retry-only variant.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: C0082 changes the primary lifecycle surface from C0081 failed directional acceleration absorption to intraday midpoint rotation rejection and escape. It is not a threshold, window, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, or capital nudge.
pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: A new fold-local midpoint rotation rejection rank surface over day midpoint failed cross, compression, escape-side close, range balance, volume reengagement, and target-first escape path quality.

feature.summary: midpoint distance pressure; failed midpoint cross depth; rotation compression ratio; midpoint rejection wick; close escape strength; range balance skew; volume reengagement; prior-day midpoint context; session escape pressure; spread stress inverse

label.summary: target-first escape path quality conditioned on midpoint rotation rejection state

model.summary: fold-local linear intraday midpoint rotation rejection rank

trade_logic.summary: dual-direction top fold-local midpoint-rotation-rejection scores per active day using next-bar-open fixed-lot discovery entries
